svg.text: Multi-agent AI analytics platform: LangGraph + DuckDB + ChromaDB + React 18
validate key, init namespace, reconfigure LLM
call_ask() to LangGraph to charts + insights
exec() 20 agent files in dep. order
3-tier: keyword then LLM classify then memory load
sql_query | rca | forecast | anomaly | math | prediction
Rolling Z-score: z = (x - mu_w) / sigma_w, flag if |z| above theta
IQR: outlier if x outside [Q1 - 1.5*IQR, Q3 + 1.5*IQR]
CUSUM: S_pos = max(0, S_pos + x_i - mu - k)
PCA recon error: ||x - P^T * P * x||^2
Granger: F-test on VAR residuals, reject H0 if p below 0.05
CLV: sum of (revenue - cost) over customer lifetime
domains: ecommerce | real_estate | financial | hr | healthcare | saas
detected if max_score at least 3, otherwise defaults to "generic"
PageRank centrality for root cause rank
blocks setup if API key is invalid
Entry point: python run.py [--build] [--dev] [--port N] | Auto-detects free port from 8000 | Serves built React SPA at / | All API routes at /api/*
